title: angelica brevicaulis
intro: Angelica brevicaulis, also known as Dong Quai, is a perennial plant native to China and used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of coumarin, a compound with anticoagulant and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including promoting menstrual regularity, reducing symptoms of menopause, and alleviating digestive issues. The roots and rhizomes of the plant are commonly used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbal supplements.
